title: [release-1.16] bump (github.com/containers/{common,image,storage})
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Bump github.com/containers/common from v0.21.0 to v0.22.0.
Bump github.com/containers/image from v5.5.2 to v5.6.0.
Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.23.3 to v1.23.5.

These aren't the latest versions from their respective branches, but it catches us up to the versions of these dependencies that are used directly in podman's 2.1 branch, which uses our release-1.16 branch.

#### How to verify it

Tests should continue to pass.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
None
```
